title: PlayerBot
description: PlayerBot is a lightweight Minecraft mod that lets you add a custom bot to your world with a simple command. The bot shows up in the in-game tab list just like a real player, making it perfect for testing, pranks, or adding life to your server.
body: PlayerBot is a lightweight Minecraft mod that lets you add a custom bot to your world with a simple command. The bot shows up in the in-game tab list just like a real player, making it perfect for testing, pranks, or adding life to your server.
